description: Fully external test of the CTI universal law on SmolLM2-1.7B (HuggingFaceTB), a genuinely new architecture family (SmolLM series, released 2024/2025) NOT in the 19-architecture training set. Tests two new datasets never seen during law calibration.
architecture_note: SmolLM2 is a compact language model from HuggingFace (released Nov 2024). Distinct from all 19 architectures used to fit/validate the universal law. Represents a genuinely new architecture family.

dbpedia_14.note: In-distribution dataset (K=14, in training set). Used as sanity check.

clinc_oos.note: OUT-OF-DISTRIBUTION: Large-K intent detection. Never seen during calibration.

minds14.note: OUT-OF-DISTRIBUTION: Intent detection, different domain. Never seen during calibration.

PR1.label: Primary alpha test (dbpedia, new architecture)
PR1.criterion: Fitted alpha for dbpedia on SmolLM2 in [2.43, 3.29]

PR2.label: Primary correlation test (dbpedia)
PR2.criterion: Pearson r(kappa_nearest, logit_q_norm) >= 0.80 on dbpedia across layers

PR3.label: New dataset test (clinc_oos, K=151)
PR3.criterion: Pearson r(kappa_nearest, logit_q_norm) >= 0.75 on clinc_oos across layers

PR4.label: New dataset test (minds14, K=14)
PR4.criterion: Pearson r(kappa_nearest, logit_q_norm) >= 0.70 on minds14 across layers

overall_pass_criterion: PR1 or PR2 (architecture generalization) PLUS at least 1 of PR3/PR4 (new domain generalization)
rationale: This test is strictly stronger than prior architecture tests: (1) SmolLM2 is a genuinely new family released after CTI calibration, (2) clinc_oos with K=151 tests large-K regime never tested on SmolLM2, (3) minds14 tests domain generalization, (4) all constants frozen from prior LOAO.
